description: Eval cases for API security: GraphQL injection, REST authorization, transaction authorization

cases.name: GraphQL query injection via string interpolation
cases.description: User input directly interpolated into GraphQL query

cases.name: Missing authorization check on REST endpoint
cases.description: REST API endpoint doesn't verify user owns the resource

cases.name: Transaction authorization bypass in payment API
cases.description: Payment endpoint doesn't verify merchant owns transaction

cases.name: API returns sensitive fields in REST response
cases.description: User object includes password hash and internal IDs in API response

cases.name: GraphQL allows unlimited field nesting (batching attack)
cases.description: GraphQL resolver doesn't limit query depth, vulnerable to batching DoS
